title: Record a token-efficiency improvement contract
prompt: Create reports/token-efficiency-contract.md with sections for Context ladder, Tool budgets, Research defaults, Proof path, and Rollback note.

fixtureActions.content:
# Token Efficiency Contract

## Context ladder
research-aligned · micro40/keep2/min4 · async70 · soft/handoff80 · hard92 · maxRecent4 · reserved50k · abs200k · recompact1 · pblock6k/3k · tool4k/80 · grep20 · web3

## Tool budgets
Tool results auto-trim at 4000 chars with 80-char preview; Grep head_limit defaults to 20 (0 = unlimited).

## Research defaults
WebSearch default limit 3 (prefer sharper query over raising limit); include_content off by default; Context7 before raw web for library APIs.

## Proof path
assertCompactionLadderSafety rejects densify soft≈async; /status Bench gate async70 soft80 hard92; focused vitest + liora smoke.

## Rollback note
If reclaim thrash returns, restore DEFAULT_COMPACTION_CONFIG from docs (soft 0.80 / hard 0.92) and re-run seed.token-efficiency-contract + holdout.research-aligned-compaction-ladder.
